metadata.description: Portable Agent Skills that raise a Maven/Gradle project PIT mutation score: detect the JDK the project needs, find mutants the tests run but do not verify, and add append-only tests that detect them without weakening any existing test, then score each test against a pure-LLM mergeability rubric (fourteen machine-checkable quality rules, line-weighted, no runtime required) so the additions are clean enough to upstream.

plugins.name: java-mutation-testing
plugins.description: Detect the project Java version, then raise its PIT mutation score with append-only tests that pass a pure-LLM mergeability rubric (standard tools only, no runtime dependency).
